config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society should automatically come first over individual rights, because that can easily become an excuse for abuse by the majority or by those in power. In my view, a healthy society protects individual rights first, while limiting them only when there is a clear and necessary public reason. From what I have seen, communities become stronger when people are treated as citizens with dignity, not just as tools for collective goals.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Hak individu harus menjadi titik awal, dan kepentingan masyarakat hanya boleh mengalahkannya dalam keadaan yang benar-benar jelas dan terbatas. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, saya sangat waspada terhadap argumen bahwa “demi masyarakat” bisa dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, diskriminasi, atau pembungkaman suara minoritas. Masyarakat memang penting, tetapi masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dari perlindungan hak individu, bukan dari pengorbanan hak itu secara otomatis. Jadi saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan sosial selalu harus diprioritaskan di atas hak pribadi.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I still reject the idea that society should automatically outrank the individual, because in Indonesia I have seen how “the common good” can be used to pressure people into silence or conformity. At the same time, I do not treat individual rights as absolute in every case; public safety, disaster response, and basic social order can justify limited restrictions when they are clear and proportionate. But the burden must always be on society or the state to prove why a restriction is necessary, not on the individual to surrender rights by default. If we reverse that standard, we make it too easy for power to hide behind morality and community language.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Hak individu tetap harus menjadi titik awal, dan saya tidak setuju jika kepentingan masyarakat dijadikan alasan default untuk mengalahkan hak pribadi. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah politik kami menunjukkan bahwa ketika negara atau mayoritas diberi terlalu banyak ruang atas nama “demi kebaikan bersama,” hasilnya sering berupa penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, diskriminasi, atau pembungkaman minoritas. Saya juga setuju bahwa ada keadaan terbatas seperti keselamatan publik atau tanggap bencana yang bisa membenarkan pembatasan, tetapi beban pembuktiannya harus sangat ketat dan proporsional. Jadi bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang otomatis mendahulukan kolektif, melainkan yang mampu melindungi martabat dan kebebasan individu sambil membatasi intervensi hanya saat benar-benar perlu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I still reject the statement as written, because in Indonesia the phrase “society first” too often becomes a shortcut for silencing individuals, especially minorities or people who are simply inconvenient to those in power. A society is not healthy if it treats personal rights as disposable; it becomes strong when it protects dignity, dissent, and fair limits on authority. That said, I do not believe rights are absolute in every situation, because emergencies, public safety, and disaster response can justify narrow restrictions. The key point is that the burden of proof must stay on the state or society, not on the individual to justify why their rights deserve respect.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat betapa mudahnya argumen “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, terutama terhadap minoritas atau suara yang tidak populer. Memang ada keadaan darurat seperti keselamatan publik atau bencana yang bisa membenarkan pembatasan, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, proporsional, dan benar-benar bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang menuntut pengorbanan hak secara default, melainkan yang justru membangun kepentingan bersama lewat perlindungan martabat dan kebebasan individu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
